title: Fit test - Disconnecting earbuds during Fit Test
scenario: Verify fit test behavior when one or both earbuds are disconnected during the test
steps: Scenario 1: Disconnect one earbud during Fit Test
Place one earbud in the charge case (close lid for Tern/Emu)
Observe the display for the disconnected earbud
Observe the display for the connected earbud
Check the text displayed on screen
Scenario 2: Disconnect both earbuds during Fit Test
Place both earbuds in the charge case (close lid for Tern/Emu)
Observe the display for both earbuds
Check the text displayed on screen
expected: Scenario 1: Disconnected earbud appears greyed out with a yellow icon and "Fail" tag; connected earbud shows proper icon and tag based on test results; text displays "The {right/left} earbud was disconnected during the fit test". Scenario 2: Both earbuds appear greyed out with yellow icon and "Fail" tag; text displays "The earbuds were disconnected during the fit test".
